race.comment: CLAUDEL (3) has been desperate for a rise in trip and finally gets it now. Drawn sticky for Berry but looks a handy filly that can get off the mark this time. SALOON PASSAGE (11) has built well into this campaign and should be near her top now out to 1400m fourth-up. Can play a major role. SNITZEL MISS (2) gets the blinkers on for the first time which could unlock her. Worth keeping safe.  INDIGO STAR (9) finds the maiden win elusive but was good last time at Wyong. Lloyd pilots and is one for the exotics.
